hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit worktree add\b' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qF '.claude/worktrees/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Worktrees must be created under .claude/worktrees/ — e.g. git worktree add .claude/worktrees/<name> <branch>"}}'; fi; }
